sub_modules.fpa_unpack: Extracts IEEE-754 single-precision sign, exponent, fraction, and class signals.
sub_modules.fpa_special_cases: Handles NaN, infinity, and zero cases with expected exception flags and signed-zero behavior.
sub_modules.fpa_align_add: Builds significands, aligns exponents with sticky-bit preservation, and performs signed magnitude add/subtract.
sub_modules.fpa_normalize_round: Normalizes the intermediate magnitude, applies rounding modes, packs the final result, and generates overflow/underflow flags.
